titleStmt.title: SII 6.719: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 719. (A.R. No. 253 of 1899). ON THE THIRD PILLAR IN THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vīrabhānunṛpatērabhivarddhamā
nē Aṣṭādaśāṁkakaḷitē jayarājyavarṣē śri
tē kaḷiṁggaviṣayaṁ vijayāvanīṁdrē
dhīrēbhirakṣati vicakṣaṇarakṣaṇajñe1śā
kābdē vyōmayugmadyumaṇipariṇa
tē kārttikē kṛṣṇapakṣē dīpāvaḷyutsavē
śrīnaraharivapuṣassiṁhaśailālaya
sya . dīpasyākhaṁḍḍadhāmnassavidhavivṛtayē
śrīmadallāḷanādhappermmāḷākhyātmajātōvi
ya ssōpyadānnavyadhēnūḥ [. 2*] vi
śvāmitrāptagōtrōsau nāyakō draviḍōtta
maḥ [.] dīpadaṁḍḍamapi prādāddiptalōhaṁ ha
rērmmudē . 3 Ācaṁdrārkkamayaṁ dharmmō dhanyai
rddharmmaparāyaṇaiḥ . vaiṣṇavaissiṁhaśailasthaiḥ
pālanīyaḥ prayatnataḥ . 4 Ēṣā nṟisiṁha
sudhiyō racitā praśastiḥ . svasti śaka
varṣaṁbulu 1200 gunēṭi śrīma
danaṁttavamma pratāpavīra śrībhā
nudēva pravarddhamāna vijayarā
jyasaṁvatsaraṁbulu 18 gu śrāhiya
ṁdu vijayadēvapaḍirāyala kaḷiṁga
parīkṣa majjitanamuna kārttika dīpāva
ḷimahōtsavamunāṁḍu viśvāmitra
gōtramuna drāviḍaperumāḷi koḍku A
llāḷanāyakuṁḍu tanaku bhagavat bha
ktikōri śrīsiṁhagirināthuni divyasanni
dhiyaṁdu Akhaṁḍadīpānaku peṭina
dhēnuvulu 47 ṭilō pāmubōyu
koḍku Eṟyibōyuni gōcarāna 24 nu la
kumanakōnāri gōcaramuna 23 nuṁgā 47
ṭiki neṟadīpāna neI callaṁgaladi vīrē pe
ṭina dīpadaṁḍu 1 ṭi visyalu 24 ṭi vela
gaṁḍamāḍalu 12 tiruArddhajāmuna
pālu Āragiṁcuṭaku peṭṭina mōdālu 5
I pālu svadēśiki paradēśiki viniyōgiṁpa
ṁgalāru I dharmmu Acaṁdrārkkamu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa .
Digital edition of SII 6.719 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
